title: Renoir
synopsis: Set in late 1980s Tokyo under bubble economy with deep loneliness, Renoir follows the turbulent life of 11-year-old Fuki. While Fuki’s father is fighting terminal illness, her mother struggles with work and caregiving, estrangement develops between them accordingly. Fuki tries to figure out the complicated adult world and yearns for connection with the help of parapsychology. She places her fear and sorrow in miracles. Through the rising star Yui Suzuki's mesmerizing performance, the film captures the delicate interplay and alienation of relationships. In Competition, Cannes Film Festival.

synopsis_lang.en: Set in late 1980s Tokyo under bubble economy with deep loneliness, Renoir follows the turbulent life of 11-year-old Fuki. While Fuki’s father is fighting terminal illness, her mother struggles with work and caregiving, estrangement develops between them accordingly. Fuki tries to figure out the complicated adult world and yearns for connection with the help of parapsychology. She places her fear and sorrow in miracles. Through the rising star Yui Suzuki's mesmerizing performance, the film captures the delicate interplay and alienation of relationships. In Competition, Cannes Film Festival.
synopsis_lang.zh_hk: 1980年代正值日本泡沫經濟快將爆破的時候，在紙醉金迷的社會，人們的孤獨有時更顯喧囂。11歲少女蕗（鈴木唯飾）的生活同樣動盪不安，父親（Lily Franky飾）罹癌住院，母親獨力扛起家庭責任。心思敏感的蕗沉迷於神秘學，嘗試以催眠和心靈感應等超能力填補失落連結，在奇幻中追尋答案，迷惘中領悟生死，將悲傷和空虛寄託於仍未發生的奇蹟。天才童星鈴木唯以深邃靈動的演技帶觀眾走進銀幕，同時感受夏日清爽與翳悶的氣息。代表日本角逐奧斯卡最佳國際影片《75終生計劃》的導演早川千繪最新力作，入選康城影展主競賽單元。

cast: Yui Suzuki, Lily Franky, Hikari Ishida, Ayumu Nakajima, Yuumi Kawai, Ryota Bando

cast_lang.en: Yui Suzuki, Lily Franky, Hikari Ishida, Ayumu Nakajima, Yuumi Kawai, Ryota Bando
cast_lang.zh_hk: 鈴木唯、Lily Franky、石田光、中島步、河合優實、坂東龍汰

subtitle: Chinese,English
